_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Implement project management, software engineering philosophies, modern capability development methodologies (Agile, TDD, CI/CD, etc), at the team level.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in building and developing high-performing data and AI teams, including talent acquisition, onboarding design, performance management, career development planning, and succession preparation.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.489), TF-K-008 (TF, cosine: 0.488).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.500). Shared vocabulary: [development, management]. DCWF-only terms [agile, capability, cd, ci, engineering, etc] vs WIDAI-only terms [acquisition, ai, building, career, data, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.855 (P=0.844, R=0.866). R exceeds P by 0.022 — the WIDAI KSA's 23 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 18 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.4%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Implement project management, software engineering philosophies, modern capabili" and "Skill in building and developing high-performing data and AI teams, including ta". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.499 ≈ STS 0.500 (gap 0.001). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [development, management] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.1%. Shared tokens: [development, management]. DCWF-only: [agile, capability, cd, ci, engineering, etc]. WIDAI-only: [acquisition, ai, building, career, data, design].
